characterships_no_self_loop.name: characterships_no_self_loop
characterships_no_self_loop.value: "characterships"."self_id" IS NULL OR "characterships"."target_id" IS NULL OR "characterships"."self_id" != "characterships"."target_id"

characterships_endpoint_xor_external.name: characterships_endpoint_xor_external
characterships_endpoint_xor_external.value:
(
				("characterships"."self_id" IS NOT NULL AND "characterships"."target_id" IS NOT NULL AND "characterships"."external_name" = '')
				OR
				(
					(("characterships"."self_id" IS NOT NULL AND "characterships"."target_id" IS NULL) OR ("characterships"."self_id" IS NULL AND "characterships"."target_id" IS NOT NULL))
					AND length("characterships"."external_name") > 0
				)
			)
